# openshift_machine_config (Resource)

Manages a MachineConfig object on an OpenShift cluster.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `extensions` (List of String)
- `files` (Attributes List) Files to place on nodes via Ignition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--files))
- `fips` (Boolean)
- `ignition_version` (String)
- `kernel_arguments` (List of String)
- `kernel_type` (String)
- `kubeconfig` (String) Path to kubeconfig. Overrides provider setting.
- `labels` (Map of String) Labels to apply to the MachineConfig (must include machineconfiguration.openshift.io/role).
- `units` (Attributes List) Systemd units to manage via Ignition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--units))

<a id="nestedatt--files"></a>
### Nested Schema for `files`

Required:

- `contents_source` (String) Ignition data URL (data:,<content> or data:text/plain;base64,<b64>).
- `path` (String)

Optional:

- `mode` (Number) File permission mode (e.g. 0644 = 420).
- `overwrite` (Boolean)


<a id="nestedatt--units"></a>
### Nested Schema for `units`

Required:

- `name` (String)

Optional:

- `contents` (String)
- `dropins` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--units--dropins))
- `enabled` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--units--dropins"></a>
### Nested Schema for `units.dropins`

Required:

- `contents` (String)
- `name` (String)
